account:setup.name: account:setup
account:setup.description: Sets up an account to use with SuiteCloud SDK and configures the default auth ID for the SuiteCloud project. This command requires browser-based login to NetSuite.

dev.name: dev
dev.description: It only needs to be specified if you want to use a customized NetSuite domain.

proxy:start.name: proxy:start
proxy:start.description: Starts a local proxy for SuiteCloud Developer Assistant service.

authid.name: authid
authid.description: References the custom alias you give to a specific account-role combination.

port.name: port
port.description: Specifies the local port for SuiteCloud Developer Assistant service. Valid range: 1024-65535.
